response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analysis: 00:00-01:14 song 'UNDEAD' (title card 'UNDEAD' shown), 01:15-03:45 song 'KICK BACK' (performer sings lyrics of 'KICK BACK', title card 'IRIS OUT' shown), 03:46-end comic/storyboard segment. 2. Metadata: 'UNDEAD' by YOASOBI, 'KICK BACK' by Kenshi Yonezu. 3. Lyrics lookup: Used search tool for lyrics. Found full lyrics for both songs. 4. JSON generation: Structured scenes and lyrics appropriately.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D VTuber performance of the songs 'UNDEAD' and 'KICK BACK', followed by a comic/storyboard sequence.
